title: EasyStaff
description: This is a very advanced staff plugin that you need!
body:
✅ EasyStaff - The Ultimate Staff Management Plugin
Manage your server like a pro with EasyStaff – an advanced all-in-one staff utility plugin that has powerful features. Whether you're running a small server or a large network, EasyStaff has everything you need.


# Dependency!
- ProtocolLib
- EasyAPI

# 🚀Features
Punishment System – Ban, mute, warn, kick, and manage players easily

Freeze Players – Instantly freeze suspected rule-breakers

Logs – Track all important staff and player actions

Whois & Alts – Investigate players and view alternate accounts

Reports – Let players report other players and manage them in one place

️Staff Modes – Enable special modes with tools for moderation

Chat Channels – Private staff chats and filtered channels

Chat Filter – Keep your server safe and clean from bad language

### Hooks – Integrates with:
- [PlaceholderAPI](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/placeholderapi.6245/)
- [TAB](https://github.com/Clearedspore/EasyStaff/issues)
- [LuckPerms](https://luckperms.net)
Discord Integration – Connect staff features directly to Discord

And much more! Check the full documentation for all features.
### Documentation
[Wiki](https://spore-plugins.gitbook.io/easystaff)
### Suggestion or bug?
Add them [here](https://github.com/Clearedspore/EasyStaff/issues)
### Need Support?
Join the discord server discord.gg/V2ZTgEr3M8.
### ✅ Compatibility
Paper and Spigot.
# Why Choose EasyStaff?
Regular updates and active support

Clean, user-friendly interface for staff members

One plugin that replaces multiple others – saving you time and server resources
## Terms
❌ You may not redistribute, sell, or claim this plugin as your own

✅ Respect the license and support the developer
